meta.note: Post-teardown snapshot — constructed from operator-confirmed outcomes (no AWS SSO available for automated re-snapshot). All whereiskurt-* resources confirmed removed by operator.

ec2.note: All whereiskurt-use1-vpc resources destroyed by km uninit --force. VPC vpc-0e5c73a8fbe72a056 gone. Orphan km-efs-use1 SG (sg-0ab33d3738b7e9ef7) in whereiskurt VPC gone (VPC delete cascades). Canonical km VPC vpc-027ba3e68c2e32549 untouched.

efs.note: No EFS filesystems existed pre-teardown (whereiskurt EFS apply failed before filesystem creation). No EFS cleanup required.

kms.note: alias/km-platform-whereiskurt-use1 removed. Key d40b51c6-e319-4d2c-9d51-511ab08cfa4c in PendingDeletion state (7-day window; scheduled 2026-05-18, deletion after 2026-05-25).

route53.note: Whereiskurt Route53 zone was preserved (operator did NOT pass --include-zone to km unbootstrap). Intentional — zone preservation is the default; pass --include-zone only for permanent decommission. Both zones unchanged from before.json.

s3.note: Both whereiskurt S3 buckets deleted by km unbootstrap. aws s3api head-bucket returns 404 Not Found for both. 15 object versions + delete markers cleared from whereiskurt-artifacts-12345678; 29 from tf-whereiskurt-state-use1.

ses.note: SES rules unchanged. No whereiskurt-specific rules existed pre-teardown. km-operator-inbound and km-sandbox-catchall remain intact.

scp.note: SCP state captured via km-org-admin role in management account 481723467561

whereiskurt_resolution.note: SCP dual-tracking resolved via Step 0 (terraform state rm). No AWS resource was destroyed — only state tracking removed. km-sandbox-containment (p-cvd490xt) remains active and attached to account 052251888500.

ssm.note: 1 SSM parameter under /whereiskurt/ deleted by km unbootstrap.

km_resources_unchanged.note: km canonical install resources confirmed intact. km list responsive. DynamoDB km-sandboxes table ACTIVE. km install byte-identical to pre-teardown state.
